headline: CME Group Launches Sorghum Basis Futures to Meet Global Feed, Export and Biofuel Demand
summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced plans to launch Sorghum basis futures. Trading is expected to start on August 24, 2026, pending regulatory review.

raw.headline: CME Group Launches Sorghum Basis Futures to Meet Global Feed, Export and Biofuel Demand
raw.summary: CME Group, the world's leading derivatives marketplace, today announced plans to launch Sorghum basis futures. Trading is expected to start on August 24, 2026, pending regulatory review.

headline: Kalshi Seeks Approval for Perpetual Futures Tied to Gold, Silver

headline: Earnings To Watch: CME Group (CME) Reports Q2 Results Tomorrow
summary: Financial derivatives exchange CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) will be reporting earnings this Wednesday before market hours. Here’s what to expect.
